name: Item Ledger
description: Canonical registry, metadata resolver, and IPFS indexer for Object Layer items — semi-fungible and non-fungible ERC-1155 tokens in the Cyberia Online ecosystem. Item search, provenance, and marketplace.
keywords: itemledger, object layer, NFT, ERC-1155, metadata, IPFS, registry, marketplace

name: Item Ledger
description: Canonical registry and IPFS indexer for Object Layer items in the Cyberia Online ecosystem.

acceptedAnswer.text: Item Ledger is the canonical registry, metadata resolver, and IPFS indexer for Object Layer items — semi-fungible and non-fungible ERC-1155 tokens in the Cyberia Online ecosystem. It provides item search, provenance tracking, and marketplace functionality.

mainEntity.name: What token standard does Item Ledger use?

acceptedAnswer.text: Item Ledger uses the ERC-1155 multi-token standard, supporting both semi-fungible and non-fungible tokens for in-game items, equipment, and collectibles within the Cyberia Online ecosystem.

mainEntity.name: How does Item Ledger use IPFS?

acceptedAnswer.text: Item Ledger indexes and resolves item metadata stored on IPFS (InterPlanetary File System), ensuring decentralized, persistent, and verifiable storage for all Object Layer item data and assets.
